free_text: Search for an intermediate structure in neutron total
Summarizes some of the total cross section measured
by J.Cabe+ in the energy region - few hundreds keV to
few MeV. Data for Cr    (0.5 MeV   - 1.206 MeV),
Diff. elastic cross section for Fe is also given.
Although in the reference, data for V are not listed
here because superseded by those given in the report
Neutron energy resolution is order of 3 keV.
Description of energy resolution in INC-SPECT is
inconsistent with its value in COMMON
